_comment: Naisargika (Sthira) Bala - fixed natural/inherent strength ranking among the seven classical grahas, consumed by shadbalaRuleEvaluator.js. Classical virupa values (BPHS), ranked Sun > Moon > Venus > Jupiter > Mercury > Mars > Saturn.
note: Rahu/Ketu are not part of the classical seven-graha Naisargika Bala system; they are treated as contributing 0 virupas to this component in the foundation Shadbala total.
